name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met during freshman orientation. She's a brilliant UI designer and a fellow coffee enthusiast.

name: Alex Rodriguez
bio: Former colleague who convinced me to start marathon training. Very disciplined and helpful.

name: Jordan Smith
bio: Living next door for three years. We usually catch up over weekend gardening or local events.

name: Priya Das
bio: Known each other since kindergarten. Life got busy lately, but we always have the best deep talks.

name: Marcus Thorne
bio: Passionate about indie game development and pixel art. We collaborate on side projects sometimes.

name: Elena Rossi
bio: Study abroad roommate in Italy. She travels the world now but we try to sync up monthly.

name: Liam Nguyen
bio: Gave me my first break in the tech industry. Great at explaining complex systems simply.

name: Sophie Müller
bio: Plays the cello and introduced me to classical fusion. We share playlists almost every day.
